abort.already_configured: A scheduler with the same name and entities already exists.

error.unsupported_domain: Only controllable entities are allowed: covers, switches, lights, climate devices, and media players.

user.title: Basic Setup
user.description: Choose what this scheduler controls and give it a name.

schedule.title: Main Schedule
schedule.description: Choose the trigger type for the main schedule window.

schedule_details.title: Main Schedule Details
schedule_details.description: Set the time for time-based triggers, or the offset for sunrise/sunset triggers.

second_window.title: Second Window
second_window.description: Optional: enable a second window and choose its trigger type.

second_window_details.title: Second Window Details
second_window_details.description: Set the time for time-based triggers, or the offset for sunrise/sunset triggers.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Choose what should happen when the scheduler starts and ends.
